title: Clarification in filing BEN-1 under CA 2013
description: Clarification in filing BEN-1 under CA 2013
text: To General Circular No. O8/2O18 F.No.01/01/2018-CL-V GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS sth Floor, 'A' Wing Shastri Bhawan, Dr. R.P. Road. New Delhi Dated: 1O.O9.2O18 All Regional Directors, All Registrars of Companies, All Stakeholders. Sir, In continuation of General Circular No. 07/2018 dated 06.09.2018, the Ministry of Corporate Affairs has received from stakeholders expressing certain difficulties in filing a declaration in Form No. BEN-1 in respect of Companies (Significant Beneficial Owners) Rules, 2018 notified uide G.S.R. No. 561(E) dated 13.06.2018. 2. Accordingly, the matter has been examined and it is hereby informed that keeping in view stakeholders concerns, Form No.BEN-l would be revised. As such, the due date of lOth September, 2018 for frling BEN-1 declaration would be revised and a revised BEN-l form would be notified shortly. Stakeholders are advised to file declaration as per the revised form only and adhere to the time Iines which will be specified therein. 3. This issues with approval of the competent authority. Yours faithfully Copy forwarded for informatlon and necessary action to:- 1. E-Governance Section 2. Guard File. reqardlng. Ph:23387263 -- 1 of 1 --
